name: saas-launch
description: End-to-end SaaS launch toolkit: the saas-launch-blueprint skill (gated ideation, PRD, prototype, build handoff for a solo bootstrapped founder) and the saas-scaffold skill with a bundled deterministic pnpm + Turborepo monorepo template (Next.js landing, offline-first Vite PWA, Mission Control admin, Supabase multi-tenant backend)
